# discord_guild_template (Resource)

Manages a guild template — a reusable snapshot of a Discord guild's structure.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "discord_guild_template" "starter" {
  server_id   = "123456789012345678"
  name        = "Community Starter"
  description = "Baseline channels and roles for new communities."
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Template name.
- `server_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the source guild the template is created from.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Template description.

### Read-Only

- `code` (String) Short template code used to share the template.
- `usage_count` (Number) Number of times the template has been used.
